# תן טיפ — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Ten Tip is a young and creative digital design and marketing studio offering comprehensive services including digital design, marketing, advertising, sales, production, and SEO. The studio specializes in advertising and marketing content with a focus on responsibility and professionalism, serving business clients across Israel and the United States.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://tan-tip.zappy5.app
תן טיפ - סטודיו עיצוב דיגיטלי בישראל המתמחה בשיווק, פרסום, קידום אתרים ועיצוב גרפי לעסקים. שירותי שיווק דיגיטלי מקצועיים עם אחריות מלאה ותוצאות מדידות.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About תן טיפ
Ten Tip is a young and creative digital design and marketing studio offering comprehensive services including digital design, marketing, advertising, sales, production, and SEO. The studio specializes in advertising and marketing content with a focus on responsibility and professionalism, serving business clients across Israel and the United States.

## Target Audience
לקוחות עסקיים בישראל וארה"ב

## Industry
שירותי פרסום ושיווק דיגיטלי
